name: SubmissionAnalyticsCollector
purpose: Append-only analytics with PII exclusion and tenant-scoped aggregation
ironRules: IR-1: Append-only storage — insert only, no updates
IR-2: PII exclusion — email, phone, ssn, password never indexed
IR-3: Tenant-scoped aggregation via tenantId from ALS
IR-4: Aggregate metrics: count, avg field count, error rate %
IR-5: Date partitioning for time-series efficiency
